informationEconomy.guidance: Prefer implication with one concrete tell before explicit explanation.

rulebookInterpretations.campaignSpecificReading: For this oath-bound PC, using a trusted person as a disposable instrument can trigger Stain even without violence.
triggers: deceives a trusted ward to make them absorb danger
costs: mark Stain or owe a public confession
permissions: strategic lies to hostile officials remain ordinary risk
excludedExamples: withholding a plan from an enemy

playEvidence.excerpt: I will not make her carry what broke me.
